name: Concentric Ice Ring
description: Smooth precision acceleration loop tracking line with a sharp sapphire edge
css: .ring { width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-top-color: #3b82f6; border-right-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Cobalt Counter-Orbit
description: Two interlocking crisp blue and white paths spinning on inverted tracks
css: .dual-ring { width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 2.5px solid transparent; border-top-color: #ffffff; border-bottom-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4); border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-clockwise 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.1, 0.4, 0.9) infinite; position: relative; } .dual-ring::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 4px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-left-color: #60a5fa; border-right-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-counter 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.1, 0.4, 0.9) infinite; } @keyframes spin-clockwise { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes spin-counter { to { transform: rotate(-360deg); } }

name: Photon Cascade
description: Fluid metric dot structures using unified deep blue to pristine white delays
css: .dots { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .dots span { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: dots-bounce 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.62, 0.05, 0.38, 0.95) infinite; } .dots span:nth-child(1) { background: #ffffff; } .dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; background: #60a5fa; } .dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; background: #2563eb; } @keyframes dots-bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 40% { transform: translateY(-14px); } }

name: Telemetry Waveforms
description: Symmetrical bright white and laser blue vertical bar rhythm layout
css: .bars { display: flex; gap: 5px; align-items: center; height: 28px; } .bars span { width: 5px; height: 100%; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 3px; transform-origin: center; animation: bar-pulse 0.85s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .bars span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -0.6s; background: #2563eb; } .bars span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -0.3s; background: #ffffff; } .bars span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: -0.45s; background: #60a5fa; } .bars span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: -0.15s; background: #ffffff; } @keyframes bar-pulse { 0% { transform: scaleY(0.25); } 100% { transform: scaleY(1); } }

name: Cyber Isometric Cube
description: 3D geometric perspective tile translation with sharp blue trailing glow
css: .sq-stage { perspective: 120px; } .sq { width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.25); border: 1.5px solid #3b82f6; animation: isometric-flip 1.3s cubic-bezier(0.7, 0, 0.3, 1) infinite; } @keyframes isometric-flip { 0% { transform: rotate(0); } 50% { transform: rotateX(180deg) rotateY(0); background: #3b82f6; } 100% { transform: rotateX(180deg) rotateY(180deg); background: #ffffff; } }

name: Oceanic Sine Wave
description: Sequential fluid linear arrays charting continuous blue-to-white math properties
css: .wave { display: flex; gap: 5px; } .wave span { width: 5px; height: 26px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 3px; animation: sine-wave 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95) infinite; } .wave span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -1.1s; background: #1d4ed8; } .wave span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -0.95s; background: #3b82f6; } .wave span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: -0.8s; background: #60a5fa; } .wave span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: -0.65s; background: #93c5fd; } .wave span:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: -0.5s; background: #ffffff; } @keyframes sine-wave { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(0.3); } 50% { transform: scaleY(1); } }

name: Hydro Sonic Ripple
description: Layered micro-thickness expanding electric blue acoustic ring echoes
css: .ripple { width: 52px; height: 52px; position: relative; } .ripple span { position: absolute; inset: 0; border: 2px solid #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.1); animation: wave-ripple 1.6s cubic-bezier(0.1, 0.8, 0.2, 1) infinite; } .ripple span:nth-child(2) { border-color: #ffffff; animation-delay: 0.8s; } @keyframes wave-ripple { 0% { transform: scale(0.1); opacity: 1; } { opacity: 0.4; } 100% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0; } }

name: Vector Azure Morph
description: Clean vector trim path arc compression mapping logic in vivid blue and white
html: <svg class="dash" viewBox="0 0 50 50"><circle class="bg-track" cx="25" cy="25" r="20" /><circle class="accent-track" cx="25" cy="25" r="20" /></svg>
css: .dash { width: 46px; height: 46px; animation: vector-spin 2s linear infinite; } .dash circle { fill: none; stroke-width: 4; stroke-linecap: round; } .dash .bg-track { stroke: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); } .dash .accent-track { stroke: #ffffff; animation: stroke-morph 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite; } @keyframes vector-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes stroke-morph { 0% { stroke-dasharray: 1, 150; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke: #3b82f6; } 50% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -40; stroke: #ffffff; } 100% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -120; stroke: #3b82f6; } }

name: Deep Space Satellite
description: Kinetic white particle mass tethered to a structural neon blue perimeter channel
css: .orbit { width: 46px; height: 46px; border: 1.5px dashed rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); border-radius: 50%; position: relative; animation: satellite-spin 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) infinite; } .sat { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; position: absolute; top: -4px; left: calc(50% - 4px); box-shadow: 0 0 8px #3b82f6, 0 0 2px #ffffff; } @keyframes satellite-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Electric Phase Lattice
description: Double micro-line intersecting blue and white continuous clock sequences
css: .fade { width: 44px; height: 44px; position: relative; } .fade::before, .fade::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid transparent; border-top-color: #ffffff; animation: spin-fluid 0.85s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.5, 1) infinite; } .fade::after { animation-delay: -0.425s; border-top-color: #3b82f6; } @keyframes spin-fluid { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Flowing Pipeline Scan
description: Clean non-blocking linear blue scanner bar track layout
css: .prog-box { width: 110px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1); } .prog-bar { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; height: 100%; width: 40%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #ffffff); border-radius: 4px; animation: continuous-scan 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite; } @keyframes continuous-scan { 0% { left: -40%; width: 30%; } 50% { width: 50%; } 100% { left: 100%; width: 30%; } }

name: Pulse Node Signal
description: Tactical sapphire blue core with a clean white expanding outer pulse ring
css: .beacon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.05); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; } .beacon::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid #ffffff; opacity: 1; animation: beacon-out 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } .core { width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #3b82f6; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 12px #3b82f6; border: 1.5px solid #ffffff; } @keyframes beacon-out { to { transform: scale(1.6); opacity: 0; } }

name: Bipolar Quantum Node
description: Interlocking blue and white nodes operating on a balanced translation cycle
css: .shift-track { display: flex; gap: 14px; position: relative; } .shift-node { width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffffff; animation: node-slide 0.9s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .shift-node:nth-child(2) { background: #3b82f6; animation-delay: -0.45s; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.6); } @keyframes node-slide { 0% { transform: scale(0.5) translateX(-8px); opacity: 0.3; } 100% { transform: scale(1.1) translateX(8px); opacity: 1; } }

name: Glacial Helix Segment
description: Single fragmented blue and white segment slicing perimeter rotation track
css: .disk-slice { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(farthest-side, transparent 65%, #3b82f6 70%) top/8px 8px no-repeat, border-box; border: 3px solid transparent; border-right-color: #ffffff; border-top-color: #3b82f6; animation: slice-spin 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.3, 0.1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } @keyframes slice-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Stark Grid Array
description: Symmetrical four-quadrant alternating white steps tracking over a dim blue backdrop
css: .block-grid { width: 34px; height: 34px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4px; } .block-grid span { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 2px; animation: grid-depth 1.3s ease infinite; } .block-grid span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; background: #60a5fa; } .block-grid span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; background: #2563eb; } .block-grid span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.6s; background: #ffffff; } @keyframes grid-depth { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.2; } }

name: Ice Eclipse Corona
description: High-contrast geometric mask framing a dynamic blue solar glow
css: .eclipse { width: 44px; height: 44px; background: #000000; border-radius: 50%; position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .eclipse::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -3px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(0deg, #ffffff 0%, #3b82f6 100%); z-index: -1; animation: coronal-rotation 1.1s linear infinite; filter: blur(1.5px); } @keyframes coronal-rotation { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
